'''âb-g-l''' ('''kabagal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outbully|outbully]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outbully|outbully]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-g-l
|-
! Lemma
| kabagal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibagal|thibagal]] || [[word:jibagal|jibagal]] || [[word:shibagal|shibagal]] || [[word:kibagal|kibagal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubagal|thuthubagal]] || [[word:jujubagal|jujubagal]] || [[word:shushubagal|shushubagal]] || [[word:kukubagal|kukubagal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubagal|thubagal]] || [[word:jubagal|jubagal]] || [[word:shubagal|shubagal]] || [[word:kubagal|kubagal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubagal|thubagal]] || [[word:jubagal|jubagal]] || [[word:shubagal|shubagal]] || [[word:kubagal|kubagal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebagal|thebagal]] || [[word:jebagal|jebagal]] || [[word:shebagal|shebagal]] || [[word:kebagal|kebagal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobagal|thothobagal]] || [[word:jojobagal|jojobagal]] || [[word:shoshobagal|shoshobagal]] || [[word:kokobagal|kokobagal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobagal|thobagal]] || [[word:jobagal|jobagal]] || [[word:shobagal|shobagal]] || [[word:kobagal|kobagal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobagal|thobagal]] || [[word:jobagal|jobagal]] || [[word:shobagal|shobagal]] || [[word:kobagal|kobagal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbagal|thĂŠbagal]] || [[word:jĂŠbagal|jĂŠbagal]] || [[word:shĂŠbagal|shĂŠbagal]] || [[word:kĂŠbagal|kĂŠbagal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabagal|thathabagal]] || [[word:jajabagal|jajabagal]] || [[word:shashabagal|shashabagal]] || [[word:kakabagal|kakabagal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabagal|thabagal]] || [[word:jabagal|jabagal]] || [[word:shabagal|shabagal]] || [[word:kabagal|kabagal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabagal|thabagal]] || [[word:jabagal|jabagal]] || [[word:shabagal|shabagal]] || [[word:kabagal|kabagal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabagal|shabagal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabagal|goshabagal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabagal|gokishabagal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabagalnĂŒ|shabagalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabagalnknĂŒ|goshabagalnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabagalnĂŒ|gokishabagalnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabagalshĂ«|shabagalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabagalnkshĂ«|goshabagalnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabagalshĂ«|gokishabagalshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabagalro|shabagalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabagalnkro|goshabagalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabagalro|gokishabagalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabagalmu|shabagalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabagalnkmu|goshabagalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabagalmu|gokishabagalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabagalsher|shabagalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabagalnksher|goshabagalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabagalsher|gokishabagalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabagalng|shabagalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabagalnkng|goshabagalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabagalng|gokishabagalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabagalya|shabagalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabagalnkya|goshabagalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabagalya|gokishabagalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabagalyam|shabagalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabagalnkyam|goshabagalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabagalyam|gokishabagalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabagalnĂŒshĂ«|shabagalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabagalnknĂŒshĂ«|goshabagalnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabagalnĂŒshĂ«|gokishabagalnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabagalnĂŒro|shabagalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabagalnknĂŒro|goshabagalnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabagalnĂŒro|gokishabagalnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabagalnĂŒmu|shabagalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabagalnknĂŒmu|goshabagalnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabagalnĂŒmu|gokishabagalnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabagalshĂ«nĂŒ|shabagalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabagalnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabagalnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabagalshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabagalshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabagalshĂ«ro|shabagalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabagalnkshĂ«ro|goshabagalnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabagalshĂ«ro|gokishabagalshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabagalshĂ«mu|shabagalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabagalnkshĂ«mu|goshabagalnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabagalshĂ«mu|gokishabagalshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabagalronĂŒ|shabagalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabagalnkronĂŒ|goshabagalnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabagalronĂŒ|gokishabagalronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabagalroshĂ«|shabagalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabagalnkroshĂ«|goshabagalnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabagalroshĂ«|gokishabagalroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabagalromu|shabagalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabagalnkromu|goshabagalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabagalromu|gokishabagalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabagalmunĂŒ|shabagalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabagalnkmunĂŒ|goshabagalnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabagalmunĂŒ|gokishabagalmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabagalmushĂ«|shabagalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabagalnkmushĂ«|goshabagalnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabagalmushĂ«|gokishabagalmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabagalmuro|shabagalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabagalnkmuro|goshabagalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabagalmuro|gokishabagalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
